common.noResults: No matches. Try another keyword or clear the filter.

hero.title: Discover, evaluate, and learn to write high-quality AI Skills
hero.subtitle: Resource hub + learning site: 20+ marketplaces, official docs, quantified criteria, curated examples

marketplaces.title: Skill Discovery
marketplaces.desc: {count} marketplaces, registries, and awesome lists for skills, MCP, and agents. They solve one problem: how to quickly find the right skill for you.
marketplaces.empty: No matching marketplaces. Try another keyword or clear the filter.

officialSkills.title: {count} Official Skills
officialSkills.desc: Official skill repositories grouped by publisher. One row per skill. Click a name to view full content (SKILL.md, references, scripts).

criteria.title: Skill Evaluation Criteria v2
criteria.desc: Based on Anthropic's official spec, the Agent Skills standard, Vercel's skills CLI docs, and a review of multiple benchmark projects. A three-layer funnel: Registry triage → Review static analysis → Benchmark on real tasks.
criteria.formulaCode: Static score = Spec×0.20 + Compat×0.15 + Description×0.20 + Examples×0.15 + Docs×0.10 + Activity×0.10 + Safety×0.10
criteria.formulaNote: Important: these 7 dimensions only answer «is this skill worth trying?» Real usefulness must be tested on actual tasks (benchmark / hands-on layer).

examples.title: Quality Skill Examples
examples.desc: These skills stand out across spec compliance, docs, examples, activity, and author credibility — benchmarks for learning and citation.

learn.title: Learn to Write Skills
learn.desc: From basic spec to advanced techniques — write a skill that Claude / Codex / Cursor can correctly load and trigger.

footer.disclaimer: Based on public docs from Anthropic, Vercel, OpenAI, GitHub, etc., and live GitHub data.

home.title: Everything, one click away
home.desc: A resource hub + learning site focused on AI Skills (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Agent Skills). Find the right skill, evaluate it, and learn to write your own.
home.cardMarketplaces: 20 marketplaces, registries, and awesome lists for skills, MCP, and agents.
home.cardOfficialSkills: A full mirror of 65 skills from 4 official publishers: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, Vercel Labs.
home.cardDocs: Official docs from top labs and companies: Anthropic, Vercel, OpenAI, GitHub, etc.
home.cardCriteria: A 7-dimension evaluation framework synthesized from first-hand and second-hand sources.
home.cardExamples: 6 verified benchmark skills, scored and dissected.
home.cardLearn: From SKILL.md spec to templates and anti-patterns, hands-on guide to writing quality skills.
